query: SELECT dogId, CASE WHEN imageUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as hasPhoto1, CASE WHEN releasePhotoUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as hasPhoto3 FROM dog_records WHERE dogId = '20260312-001';
